rationale: Review 2 surfaces a real, narrowly-scoped placement defect — a public lemma in the mismatched TauCeti.HopfAlgebra namespace (lines 60-69), used once internally — with a clean private fix, while accepting the roadmap-aligned file location the docstring explicitly justifies. Review 1 demands a heavy three-file split that conflicts with the file's stated functor-of-points purpose and buries the same lemma in that less-justified restructure; I confirmed the namespace mismatch in the diff but could not verify its antipodeAlgHom description claim.
